temporal_description:
The audio is dominated by a tense and suspenseful instrumental track. A driving, percussive beat creates a sense of urgency and anticipation, while a high-pitched, slightly dissonant melody plays over it, adding to the feeling of unease and impending action. The music is continuous and builds a mood of high-stakes drama. There is no dialogue or other sound effects present.

The scene opens with a medium shot of a group of men in a dimly lit, narrow space. In the center, a man in a grey suit jacket and a light blue shirt is the focus. He is drinking from a clear plastic water bottle. To his left, another man in a striped shirt and glasses watches him. To the right, two other men stand and observe the interaction. The background is dark and cluttered, with a striped tarp hanging overhead and various posters and signs on the walls. The overall lighting is cool and moody. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The camera remains steady, holding the composition.

The camera cuts to a wide shot of a long, narrow corridor, likely an entrance to a building. The man in the grey suit is now seen from a distance, standing alone in the middle of the corridor, looking down. The corridor is lined with various storefronts and elevators. Signs with Chinese characters are visible on the walls and doors. A small white van is parked at the far end of the corridor. The lighting is functional and cool-toned. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner. The camera is static, establishing the setting and the man's solitary position within it.

The shot changes to a medium close-up of a man in a green blazer and a blue shirt. He is walking towards the camera with a determined and slightly angry expression, pointing his finger forward as if making an accusation or a strong statement. Behind him, another man in a patterned shirt is visible, looking on. The background is the same dimly lit corridor from the previous shot. The "风行网" watermark is still present in the top right. The camera is steady, focusing on the man's aggressive gesture and expression.
